title: Marqeta (MQ) Achieves Record $383B TPV in 2025 Driven by Strong European Expansion
text: Marqeta's 2025 Performance and European Growth. Full Year TPV Achievement: Marqeta Inc. reached a record milestone in 2025 with $383 billion in Total Processing Volume (TPV), representing a 31% increase compared to 2024. The fourth quarter alone demonstrated strong momentum, with TPV surging 36% year-over-year to $109 billion. Financial Highlights: Beyond volume growth, the company achieved notable financial progress. Annual net revenue climbed to $625 million (23% increase). Gross profit reached $437 million (24% increase). Q4 marked near break-even status with a net loss of just over $1 million. European Expansion Impact: The article specifically attributes 2025's strong performance to expansion in Europe and strong demand for modern card issuing across various use cases. While detailed metrics on European operations aren't provided, management highlighted emerging partnerships driving growth, including programs such as a new initiative for Uber drivers in the UK. Forward Outlook: For 2026, Marqeta projects net revenue growth between 12-14%, with expectations of reaching approximately $10 million in GAAP net income despite facing competitive pressures from Block's diversification efforts.
